title: DataService
description: A service that provides access to data or data processing functions

contactPoint.title: contact point
contactPoint.description: Contact information for questions about the Data Service. Include an email address that is continuously monitored

endpointDescription.title: endpoint description
endpointDescription.description: List of endpoint descriptions with operations and parameters (for example, OpenAPI or similar service documentation)

endpointURL.title: endpoint URL
endpointURL.description: A list of root locations or primary endpoints of the service (a Web-resolvable IRI)

items.title: URLs
items.description: The root location or primary endpoint of the service (a Web-resolvable IRI)

keyword.title: keyword/tag
keyword.description: List of keywords or tags describing the data service

servesDataset.title: serves dataset
servesDataset.description: List of datasets this service provides access to

spatialResolutionInMeters.title: spatial resolution in meters
spatialResolutionInMeters.description: The minimum spatial separation resolvable in a Data Service, measured in meters

temporalResolution.title: temporal resolution
temporalResolution.description: The minimum time period resolvable by the Data Service

theme.title: theme/category
theme.description: List of themes or categories for the data service

accessRights.title: access rights
accessRights.description: Information about whether the data service is publicly accessible, restricted, or not public

anyOf.description: Text description of the access rights

conformsTo.title: conforms to
conformsTo.description: List of general standards or specifications that the Data Service endpoints implement

created.title: creation date
created.description: The date on which the Data Service was first created

anyOf.description: A year and month in YYYY-MM format

_oldDocs.range: rdfs:Literal typed as xsd:date or xsd:dateTime

creator.title: creator
creator.description: List of agents primarily responsible for producing the Data Service

description.title: description
description.description: Plain-language summary of the data service
examples: A RESTful API providing access to historical and real-time climate data including temperature, precipitation, and atmospheric conditions.

identifier.title: identifier
identifier.description: The unique identifier for the Data Service, e.g. the URI or other unique identifier in the context of the Catalog

otherIdentifier.title: other identifier
otherIdentifier.description: A list of identifiers for the Data Service besides the main identifier, e.g. the URI or other unique identifiers in the context of the Catalog

language.title: language
language.description: ISO 639-1 language code values supported by the data service, such as en or es, full list can be seen at https://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/iso639-1.html

license.title: license
license.description: License that governs how the data service can be used or reused

modified.title: update/modification date
modified.description: The most recent date on which the Data Service was changed or modified

anyOf.description: A year and month in YYYY-MM format

_oldDocs.range: rdfs:Literal (typed as xsd:date, xsd:dateTime, xsd:gYear or xsd:gYearMonth)

publisher.title: publisher
publisher.description: Person or organization responsible for publishing and making the data service available

rights.title: rights
rights.description: Rights statements not already covered by license or accessRights, such as copyright or policy restrictions
examples: Data provided by the National Climate Data Center is in the public domain.

rightsHolder.title: rights holder
rightsHolder.description: A list of Agents (organizations) holding rights on the Data Service

spatial.title: spatial/geographic coverage
spatial.description: A geographic region that is covered by the Data Service

temporal.title: temporal coverage
temporal.description: Time periods covered by the data service

title.title: title
title.description: Human-readable title of the data service

category.title: category
category.description: List of high-level categories for the data service

hasQualityMeasurement.title: quality measurement
hasQualityMeasurement.description: Quality measurements for the data service (for example, availability, response time, or reliability)

qualifiedAttribution.title: qualified attribution
qualifiedAttribution.description: List of agents with specific responsibilities for the data service

wasUsedBy.title: was used by
wasUsedBy.description: List of activities that used or tested the data service

_oldDocs.rationale: Introducing dcat:DataService is essential as it clarifies the representation of data services, addressing the confusion caused by using dcat:Distribution to describe services in DCAT 1. This addition promotes clear communication of service-related information, improving discoverability, and facilitating seamless integration and usage by data consumers and applications.

examples.title: Climate Data API
examples.description: RESTful API providing access to historical climate observations.
